issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling for data loading, caching failures, or deployment errors.
The skill includes OpenAI API usage, which is vendor-specific and may limit compatibility with other AI providers.

scenarios.name: Sales dashboard with filters, KPIs, and trend chart from parquet
scenarios.rationale: Baseline lacks wide layout, @st.cache_data, sidebar filter placement, and st.columns/st.metric KPI row; treatment applies all four documented patterns.

scenarios.name: Streaming OpenAI chat with persistent history
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses session_state but misses st.chat_message, st.chat_input, st.write_stream streaming, and st.secrets; treatment uses every documented chat pattern.
